## What are you changing?

- Project / entry:
- Category:
- Change type: add / fix / remove
- Are you the author or maintainer of this project? (disclosure required): yes / no

## Why it belongs

<!-- One or two sentences: what it does and why a Codex user would want it. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] One project only.
- [ ] Placed in the correct category, near similar tools.
- [ ] Format: `- [Name](url) - Description. ` + language / runs / source tags.
- [ ] Description is one objective sentence and ends with a period.
- [ ] Link works and points to the canonical repo or homepage.
- [ ] Language, runs, and source tags are accurate.
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing entry.
- [ ] Entry was written and reviewed by me, not auto-generated.
